evals.prompt: Mon agent re-scanne tout le projet à chaque session pour retrouver les fichiers et fonctions. Mets en place un système d'index pour qu'il trouve tout directement, et vérifie que ça marche.
evals.expected_output: A working greppable index system in the single repo: generator script installed and valid, index file(s) with dirs/files/symbols incl. tricky elements (extensionless node executable, non-exported TS const), gitignore + CLAUDE.md wired, staleness detection working, validation report saved.
assertions: index generator script installed at repo root, executable, passes bash -n
index output generated containing dirs, files and symbols (path:line:definition) sections
CLAUDE.md tells agents to consult the index before scanning
the extensionless node executable tools/runner contributes its function invoke as a symbol with file:line
the non-exported TS const internalCache in src/util.ts is locatable via the index
staleness detection: a check mode reports fresh after generation and stale after an uncommitted edit to a tracked file
validation evidence present in outputs/report.md (gates/checks actually run, not just claimed)

evals.prompt: Ce workspace multi-repo a des membres clonés et gitignorés (api/ en Go, web/ en TypeScript) plus des scripts à la racine. Mets en place un index de code pour que les agents localisent fichiers et symboles dans tous les membres sans scanner, et valide que ça marche.
evals.expected_output: Per-member greppable indexes covering root scripts + api (Go) + web (TS), incl. route lines; gitignore + CLAUDE.md wired; staleness detection; validation report saved.
assertions: index generator script installed at workspace root, executable, passes bash -n
every unit is indexed: root scripts, api/ member, web/ member
Go symbols indexed: func Serve and type Server from api/main.go with file:line
the HTTP route registration app.get("/health") in web/src/index.ts is locatable via the index
root shell function deploy_fn in deploy.sh is locatable via the index
index output gitignored AND CLAUDE.md tells agents to consult the index
staleness detection: check mode flags an uncommitted edit in a member repo
validation evidence present in outputs/report.md (gates/checks actually run, not just claimed)
